Build deterministic Go evidence to prove duplicate suppression, independent waiters, safe publication, and in-flight cleanup; all goroutines, bodies, signals, timers, and files require named cleanup ownership; then change one catch, owned record, encounter relation, or history state and prove the prior invariant. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Use barriers, controlled transports, many interleavings, race runs, duplicate-count assertions, and leak-sensitive cleanup checks.

For Pokedex product engineering and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Pokedex Go Concurrency Test…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A normal fast unit-test run can prove absence of data races.
